title: [CI:DOCS] Docs revamp.
body:
* Rewrote the Home and Introduction pages.
* Created a dedicated Search page
* Rewrote the Tutorials page to have native links in RTD/Shpinx
* Added iframe to Reference page to display API reference docs inline

Signed-off-by: Scott McCarty smccarty@redhat.com

comments.body: @fatherlinux The gating tests does not like trailing white spaces.
Scott,  you will need to squash your commits. And repush as a single commit to fix the gating test.
@rhatdan ack. Will do. Fixing, testing, then will repush.
@fatherlinux is this all up on the libpod readthedocs?  It would be easier to review there if so.

@TomSweeneyRedHat  yeah it's at here [1]. FYI, hit shift refresh if anything looks out of sync. Closing this pull request.
[1]: https://libpod.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html
